info.name: Avalara Excise Platform API
info.description:
The Avalara Excise Platform API provides an external programmatic interface for excise tax determination on fuel, tobacco, alcohol, and other excise products. It supports tax calculation, business entity management, location configuration, and transaction processing for excise tax compliance across US federal and state jurisdictions.

Contact Support:
 Name: Avalara Developer Relations
 Email: developer.relations@avalara.com

request.description: Calculates excise taxes for a transaction containing one or more line items with product, origin, destination, and movement information.
